codeReview.summary: Reviewed the mission docs, prior failure report, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 0703320e470f5c938489865361b373e84793ef44. The server now replays `attach-status-changed` on resumed registrations even when `attachedUser` is null, which restores the wrapper's detached state after reconnect, and the added regression test covers the exact offline-detach/reconnect scenario that failed previously. I found no remaining blocking defects in this fix diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared docs still do not state the reconnect-time attachment replay invariant explicitly: when a wrapper resumes, the server must replay the current `attach-status-changed` state, including `attached:false`, so the wrapper can resynchronize after an offline detach.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/library/architecture.md:158-160` says the server is the source of truth and sessions reconnect gracefully, and `validation-contract.md:142-145` says wrappers receive `attach-status-changed` on attach/detach, but neither document requires replaying the current attachment state after reconnect; the implemented rule now lives in `server/src/relay-server.ts:344-349` and is exercised by `server/src/relay-server.test.ts:255-323`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ts-worker skill's documented RED/manual-verification steps do not match how this fix was executed and reported: the transcript skeleton shows code edits before the first targeted regression-test run, and the handoff marks `followedProcedure: true` without any recorded manual API check.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/ts-worker/SKILL.md:26-50` requires writing failing tests first and manually verifying server features with `curl`; the transcript skeleton for session `cbb685d3-b1f9-4b91-b9e5-c1910fd909c1` shows `ApplyPatch` before the first targeted `npx vitest run src/relay-server.test.ts -t "replays detached attach status when a wrapper reconnects after offline detach"` run, and the handoff file records `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` with no `interactiveChecks` section.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the prior server-message-relay failure, transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit 0703320e470f5c938489865361b373e84793ef44. This rerun adequately fixes the prior reconnect/detach blocker by replaying `attach-status-changed` on wrapper resume even when detached, and the added regression test covers the offline-detach reconnect path.
